---
name: Broken Subtitle Report
about: Submit malformed or problematic subtitle files for diagnostics testing
title: “[BROKEN SUBTITLE] “
labels: bug
assignees: ‘’
---

Subtitle Source

Examples:

* YouTube auto captions
* Premiere export
* DaVinci Resolve export
* CapCut export
* unknown source

Problem Description

Describe:

* what failed
* what broke
* what software rejected the subtitle file
* what looked incorrect

File Type

Examples:

* .srt
* .vtt
* .ass

Corruption Symptoms

Check all that apply:

* malformed timestamps
* broken arrows
* duplicate indices
* overlapping timing
* broken imports
* spacing corruption
* unreadable segmentation
* encoding issues
* other

Sample File

Attach the problematic subtitle file if possible.
